last_prompt: Implement the `wreck-it tasks` sub-command family designed in ideas-task-cli-management. Add a `Tasks` variant to the Commands enum in cli/src/cli.rs with `list`, `add`, `set-status`, and `validate` sub-commands and their respective argument structs. Create cli/src/task_cli.rs implementing each sub-command: list prints a formatted table (id, role, phase, status, depends_on count), add reads the task file, appends the new task, and writes it back, set-status mutates the matching task's status field in place, validate checks for duplicate IDs and unresolved depends_on chains and reports errors. Wire the `Tasks` command in cli/src/main.rs. No new crate dependencies beyond what is already available (use the existing serde_json and tabular-style formatting with plain std string formatting).
